title: Boss Rush
body:
![Boss Rush](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dd7f34cd637ebbe1e805327ba24d7fe165194a4.png)

## **[Overview]**
Added a customizable BOSS RUSH continuous challenge system to the game.

After using a challenge ticket, players enter the battle arena. 
Once the battle begins, monsters will spawn from the central block. Upon defeating all bosses, rewards are distributed based on performance.

There are four difficulty stages, each with different monster types, attack patterns, and health points.

This system supports both single-player challenges and server-wide multiplayer challenges, with a maximum of 4 participants in multiplayer mode.

The greatest advantage of this mod is its full customization of all monsters and rewards, allowing players to revisit bosses from certain structures that were previously one-time encounters.

When paired with mods like Epic Fight or Better Combat, it maximizes the fun and engagement of the experience.

## **【概述】**
为游戏添加了可自定义BOSS RUSH连续闯关系统。

玩家使用挑战券后进入战斗场所，战斗开始后，怪物会从中心方块生成。击杀所有BOSS后结算即可拿到对应的奖励。
一共有四种阶段难度，不同难度下怪物类型/攻击/血量均不同。

此系统包含了单人挑战和服务器多人挑战，多人挑战最大参与人数为4人。
此模组最大的优势在于所有怪物和奖励配置均可自定义，一些结构中只能打一遍的BOSS可以使用此模组重新体验。

配合史诗战斗/Better Combat等模组可以最大发挥它的趣味性。

![Countdown several seconds, the boss will be summoned next to BR_Block.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf20f7ad22f691650fbd7b89c77a05469d80285d_0.webp)
